description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/nobodyinperson/simbuto/ubuntu_16.04, defining the stages build, build-test, install-test, app-test, deploy, and deploy-test and setting the DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR variable. In the build stage add an autoconf-build job that runs `autoreconf --install`, `./configure`, `make`, `make dist`, `make distcheck`, `make install`, and `make uninstall`, and archives any `*-*.tar.gz` files as artifacts retained for one week; also add a debian-package-build job that runs `autoreconf --install`, `dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc`, `mkdir -p $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR`, and `cp ../*.deb ../*.dsc ../*.changes $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR`, publishing the contents of `$DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR` as artifacts named `${CI_JOB_STAGE}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}`. In the build-test stage add a debian-package-test job (no before_script) that runs `dpkg-deb -I $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb`, `dpkg -c $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb`, and `lintian --fail-on-warnings $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb`, with `GIT_STRATEGY=none`. In the install-test stage add a debian-package-install-uninstall job that uses the `ubuntu` image, runs a before_script `apt-get -qq update >/dev/null`, then executes `dpkg -i $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb || true` and `dpkg -r $(dpkg -I $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb | perl -ne 'if(s/^\s*package:\s*(\w+)$/$1/ig){print;exit}')`, also with `GIT_STRATEGY=none`. In the deploy stage add an apt-deploy job that runs `apt-get -qq update >/dev/null`, `apt-get -y -qq install apt-transport-https >/dev/null`, `eval $(ssh-agent -s)`, `ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY")`, `mkdir -p ~/.ssh`, `echo "$SSH_DEPLOY_HOSTKEYS" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts`, and `scp -qP "$SSH_DEPLOY_PORT" "$DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR"/*.deb "$SSH_DEPLOY_ADDRESS"`, triggers only on tags, defines a production environment at http://apt.nobodyinperson.de, and stores the `.deb` files as artifacts named debian-package. In the deploy-test stage add an apt-install-test job that runs `apt-get -qq update >/dev/null`, `apt-get -y -qq install apt-transport-https wget >/dev/null`, `set -e`, `export DEBFILE=($DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb)`, `echo "debian package file: $DEBFILE"`, `export PACKAGE_NAME=$(dpkg -I $DEBFILE | perl -ne 'if(s/^\s*package:\s*(\S+)\s*$/$1/ig){print;exit}')`, `export PACKAGE_VERSION=$(dpkg -I $DEBFILE | perl -ne 'if(s/^\s*version:\s*(\S+)\s*$/$1/ig){print;exit}')`, `echo "built package version: $PACKAGE_VERSION"`, `wget -qO- https://apt.nobodyinperson.de/gpg.key | apt-key add -`, `echo "deb https://apt.nobodyinperson.de unstable main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nobodyinperson.list`, `apt-get update -qq`, `apt-get download -y -qq $PACKAGE_NAME`, `export APT_PACKAGE_VERSION=$(dpkg -I $PACKAGE_NAME*.deb | perl -ne 'if(s/^\s*version:\s*(\S+)\s*$/$1/ig){print;exit}')`, `echo "apt package version: $APT_PACKAGE_VERSION"`, `test "$PACKAGE_VERSION" = "$APT_PACKAGE_VERSION"`, and `apt-get install -y -qq $PACKAGE_NAME >/dev/null`, also only on tags with `GIT_STRATEGY=none`.
